title: Jasper's Mod-Pack
description: My Idea Of The Perfect Mod-Pack To Use For Minecraft To Get Updated Features And Graphics Whiles Maintaining The Feel Of Vanilla Minecraft
body:
**Jasper's Mod-Pack**
---------------------

**Turn Up Ram Capabilities In ModRinth Settings!!!!**

My Idea Of The Perfect Vanilla Mod-Pack

- Features:
- Amazing Shaders
- Easy Settings Preset, Plug And Play
- Brings Back Failed Mob Votes
- Physics Mod
- Amazing Quality Of Life Mods
- Optimisation Mods To Make Your Game Run Better
- 3D Block Models
- Distant Horizons Mod To See As Far As Your PC Lets You
- Seameless Controller Support
- World Map, Waypoints And A Minimap
- Better Sounds
- More Mob Variants
- Better Animations
- And Much More
